folio.label: 160v
folio.l: And heere bigynnetú the Tale of Melibeus :

A ©ong man called Melibeus mygúty and riche , bygat
vp on his wyf , that called was Prudence , a do-
ugúter , whicú that called was Sophie ,

vp on a
day bifel , that he for his disport , is went in to æe
feldes , hi~ to pleye ,

his wyf & eke his dougúter hatú he laft , w
Inne his hous , of whicú the dores , weren fast I shette ,

three of
his olde foos , han it espied , and setten laddres , to the walles of
his hous , and by wyndowes ben entred ,
